title: Taylor & Brown 85cm Light Up Reindeer Stag Head Metal Framed Deer Stags Head Christmas Xmas Wall Decoration Plug in with 80 LED's for Indoor Outdoor (Warm White)
features: 𝐈𝐌𝐏𝐑𝐄𝐒𝐒𝐈𝐕𝐄 𝐒𝐈𝐙𝐄 & 𝐃𝐄𝐒𝐈𝐆𝐍: Measuring 85cm (H) x 66cm (W), the large stag head makes a bold statement for your Christmas decorations. Its metal-framed 3D design adds a striking and elegant feature to any wall.

𝐁𝐑𝐈𝐆𝐇𝐓 & 𝐄𝐂𝐎-𝐅𝐑𝐈𝐄𝐍𝐃𝐋𝐘 𝐋𝐈𝐆𝐇𝐓𝐈𝐍𝐆: The 80 warm white LED lights create a stunning glow, perfect for both indoor and outdoor settings. The timer function allows the lights to automatically turn on for 8 hours and off for 16, making it energy-efficient.

𝐄𝐀𝐒𝐘 𝐓𝐎 𝐇𝐀𝐍𝐆: This light-up reindeer head is easy to mount on walls, thanks to its sturdy construction and simple hanging mechanism. Ideal for homes, offices, or outdoor displays during the holiday season.
𝐏𝐋𝐔𝐆-𝐈𝐍 𝐂𝐎𝐍𝐕𝐄𝐍𝐈𝐄𝐍𝐂𝐄: Comes with a generous 10-meter mains cable and low voltage transformer, giving you plenty of flexibility for indoor and outdoor placement.
𝐃𝐔𝐑𝐀𝐁𝐋𝐄 & 𝐖𝐄𝐀𝐓𝐇𝐄𝐑-𝐑𝐄𝐒𝐈𝐒𝐓𝐀𝐍𝐓: Built for both indoor and outdoor use, the Taylor & Brown Reindeer Stag Head is made to withstand winter weather while adding a festive charm to your space.
description: Product description Illuminate your home this holiday season with the Taylor & Brown 85cm Light Up Reindeer Stag Head, a stunning Christmas wall decoration perfect for indoor and outdoor use. With a sturdy 3D metal frame and 80 warm white LED lights, this impressive reindeer head creates a festive atmosphere wherever it's displayed. Designed to be eco-friendly, it includes a timer function that keeps the lights on for 8 hours and off for 16, reducing energy consumption while adding a magical touch to your Christmas décor. Key Features: 𝐈𝐌𝐏𝐑𝐄𝐒𝐒𝐈𝐕𝐄 𝐒𝐈𝐙𝐄 & 𝐃𝐄𝐒𝐈𝐆𝐍: Measuring 85cm (H) x 66cm (W), the large stag head makes a bold statement for your Christmas decorations. Its metal-framed 3D design adds a striking and elegant feature to any wall. 𝐁𝐑𝐈𝐆𝐇𝐓 & 𝐄𝐂𝐎-𝐅𝐑𝐈𝐄𝐍𝐃𝐋𝐘 𝐋𝐈𝐆𝐇𝐓𝐈𝐍𝐆: The 80 warm white LED lights create a stunning glow, perfect for both indoor and outdoor settings. The timer function allows the lights to automatically turn on for 8 hours and off for 16, making it energy-efficient. 𝐄𝐀𝐒𝐘 𝐓𝐎 𝐇𝐀𝐍𝐆: This light-up reindeer head is easy to mount on walls, thanks to its sturdy construction and simple hanging mechanism. Ideal for homes, offices, or outdoor displays during the holiday season. 𝐏𝐋𝐔𝐆-𝐈𝐍 𝐂𝐎𝐍𝐕𝐄𝐍𝐈𝐄𝐍𝐂𝐄: Comes with a generous 10-meter mains cable and low voltage transformer, giving you plenty of flexibility for indoor and outdoor placement. 𝐃𝐔𝐑𝐀𝐁𝐋𝐄 & 𝐖𝐄𝐀𝐓𝐇𝐄𝐑-𝐑𝐄𝐒𝐈𝐒𝐓𝐀𝐍𝐓: Built for both indoor and outdoor use, the Taylor & Brown Reindeer Stag Head is made to withstand winter weather while adding a festive charm to your space. Safety Warning Outdoor use only. Unplug during inclement weather. Do not allow children to play on or near the display. Keep away from flammable materials.
